core_mechanism: graph-based agglomerative clustering via a minimum spanning tree (grouping elements into clusters by nearest-neighbour proximity/connectivity), refined by accepting or rejecting each candidate cluster against a per-cluster stability threshold criterion
brief_reason: The abstract builds fragments by extending the minimum spanning tree method for clusterization and then subjects each resulting cluster to a binding-energy (stability threshold) check, which is exactly proximity-linkage clustering augmented with a per-cluster acceptance criterion.
